title: T-047 — Wizard step Server Actions (validate/dataPreview/bomPreview/allergenAudit/constantsCheck/n1Preview/mfaChallenge/execute)
prompt:
# T-047 — optional D365 export/import Wizard step actions

PRD: docs/prd/01-NPD-PRD.md §10.6.1
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
8 wizard step Server Actions per §10.6.1 table that emit SSE phase events and chain into transactional rollback on execute failure.

## Implementation contract
New apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/actions/wizard/* — one file per step. Each action emits SSE event 'fa.builder.progress' with phase label. wizardExecute mirrors buildD365 but wrapped in tx with rollback on any failure (xlsx | persist | emit). Modal becomes dismissible only after success or final rollback.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/actions/wizard/wizard-validate.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/actions/wizard/wizard-data-preview.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/actions/wizard/wizard-bom-preview.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/actions/wizard/wizard-allergen-audit.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/actions/wizard/wizard-constants-check.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/actions/wizard/wizard-n1-preview.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/actions/wizard/wizard-mfa-challenge.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/actions/wizard/wizard-execute.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/actions/wizard/__tests__/wizard.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given wizardValidate runs and any V01-V08 fails, when it returns, then the result blocks Next button (returns blocking errors per phase)
2. Given wizardExecute begins and persist step throws, when transaction commits, then fa.built remains FALSE and no fa_builder_outputs row is inserted (full rollback)
3. Given the full happy path runs, when wizardExecute returns success, then SSE has emitted phases in order: validate → data_preview → bom_preview → allergen_check → constants_check → n1_preview → mfa → execute_compute → execute_xlsx → execute_persist → execute_emit

## Test strategy
- RED: 3 integration tests in __tests__/wizard.test.ts covering blocking, rollback, SSE phase ordering
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test wizard'

## Risk red lines
- Do not partially commit on rollback
- Do not skip MFA gate
- Do not allow non-monotonic SSE phase ordering

2026-05-03 override: D365 is optional integration/export/import only, not canonical source of truth; wizard validation must include V18 Open High risk as a hard blocker.

pipeline_inputs.description: 8 wizard Server Actions per §10.6.1 with SSE phase events + transactional rollback on execute failures.
pipeline_inputs.details:
Each action streams SSE phase events. wizardExecute wraps build+persist+emit in single tx; on failure rolls back fully and surfaces inline error. Modal dismissibility toggled by action result. D365 output is optional integration/export/import only; Monopilot/NPD Builder remains canonical for WIP + FG + validated BOM/product records. V18 open High risk is a hard build/export blocker.

Additional acceptance detail preserved from compressed AC list:
- Given full happy path runs, when wizardExecute returns success, then SSE emitted phases in order: validate → data_preview → bom_preview → allergen_check → constants_check → n1_preview → mfa → execute_compute → execute_xlsx → execute_persist → execute_emit
- UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright is unavailable, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.
out_of_scope: Do not duplicate buildD365 single-click action (T-044)
Do not implement wizard UI here (T-046)
acceptance_criteria: Given wizardValidate runs and any V01-V08 fails or V18 has an Open High risk, when it returns, then the result blocks Next button
Given V18 has an Open High risk, when wizardValidate runs, then the result blocks Next/Execute with 'V18_HIGH_RISK_OPEN'.
Given wizardExecute persist step throws, when transaction commits, then fa.built remains FALSE and no fa_builder_outputs row exists

Given the task is closed out, when reviewers inspect the task evidence, then these additional requirements are proven together: Given full happy path runs, when wizardExecute returns success, then SSE emitted phases in order: validate → data_preview → bom_preview → allergen_check → constants_check → n1_preview → mfa → execute_compute → execute_xlsx → execute_persist → execute_emit; UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright is unavailable, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.
test_strategy: RED: 3 integration tests in __tests__/wizard.test.ts covering blocking, rollback, SSE phase ordering before actions exist
For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video/artifacts where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.
risk_red_lines: Do not partially commit on rollback
Do not allow non-monotonic SSE phase ordering
Do not treat D365 as source of truth; it is optional integration/export/import only.
Do not allow any build/export path when V18 has an Open High risk; V18 is a hard built-blocker.
